name: What benefits can I get if I hurt my hand lifting boxes at work?
description: Medical, 66 2/3% lost wages, disability—Utah no-fault system.[1]

mainEntity.name: What benefits can I get if I hurt my hand lifting boxes at work?

acceptedAnswer.text: Medical, 66 2/3% lost wages, disability—Utah no-fault system.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Workers' comp covers medical bills, lost wages (typically 66 2/3% of average wages), and disability benefits.** Utah's system provides no-fault coverage for work injuries.[1][3] Key factors: Must be reported timely; insurer pays approved treatments. Covers economic damages like bills and wages, not pain/suffering. File claims promptly; appeal denials via hearing.
